title: inula squarrosa var. bubonium
intro: Inula squarrosa var. bubonium, also known as Inula helenium, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Inula helenium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Inula helenium is often used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
